entries.definition:
قَسَم qasam [n.] oath (56:76) وَإِنَّهُ لَقَسَمٌ لَوْ تَعْلَمُونَ عَظِيمٌ and it is a mighty oath, if you only knew.
قِسْمَة qismatun [n.; v. n.] partition, dividing (4:8) وَإِذَا حَضَرَ الْقِسْمَةَ أُولُو الْقُرْبَىٰ وَالْيَتَامَىٰ وَالْمَسَاكِينُ فَارْزُقُوهُمْ and if [other] kinfolk, orphans and the poor attend the division, make provision for them out of it [of the legacy].

مَقْسُوم maqsūm [pass. part.] apportioned, assigned, allotted (15:44) لَهَا سَبْعَةُ أَبْوَابٍ لِكُلِّ بَابٍ مِنْهُمْ جُزْءٌ مَقْسُومٌ it has seven gates, to each belongs an allotted share of them [the inmates].

مُقَسِّمَات muqassimāt [pl. of fem. act. part. مُقَسِّمَة muqassimatun] those who carry out acts of apportioning (51:4) فَالْمُقَسِّمَاتِ أَمْرًا who apportion what is ordained.

مُقْتَسِمِين muqtasimīn [pl. of act. part. مُقْتَسِم muqtasim] those who divide with others, those who take a share; those who divine, or seek omens (15:90) كَمَا أَنْزَلْنَا عَلَى الْمُقْتَسِمِينَ like the [warning] We sent down for those who were selective in their beliefs [lit. take some parts [of the teachings]].
